stemHtml: After the aircraft has stopped on the apron, a disembarking passenger walks into the wing trailing edge and is seriously injured. How is this classified and what must be done?

options.a: It is an accident and the crew must follow the relevant accident procedure.
options.b: It is an incident — the PIC must report to the airport authority within 48 hours.
options.c: It is a handling irregularity — the handling agent informs their insurer.
options.d: It is a passenger insurance matter — the airport operator or handler writes a report.
